smith_rina_calvex:idle.greeting: Rina taps the bench with a small hammer. "Walker. Tea's on the second shelf. Help yourself."

playerOptions.text: I have an alloy commission from the hub.
I'd like to learn one of your alloys.

nodes.npcText: "Hub-side? Lyra Brassgate by chance? Show me the spec."
"Bring me an apprenticeship token from the hub Foundry and we'll begin."

healer_sevn_orn:idle.greeting: Sevn rinses her hands in a copper bowl. "Walker. Patients or talk?"

playerOptions.text: Arn Tev sends cuttings from the ruins.

nodes.npcText: "Bring them around back, under the tarp. Don't be seen. I'll see they get to the right people."
